results.title: Soccer-Rogers named Europa League player of the season after inspiring Villa victory
results.description: May 21 (Reuters) - ⁠Aston Villa midfielder Morgan Rogers has ⁠been named the Europa League ‌Player of the Season after inspiring his side to a 3-0 victory over German ​team Freiburg in the final, ⁠UEFA said on ⁠Thursday.

results.title: Souhan: Twins’ trade deadline selloff worked, but the Pohlads should have spent more this offseason
results.description: Signing a closer and another good hitter could have made this team, which is currently just 11⁄2 games out of a wild-card spot, much more fun to watch.
